# Quick Install

1. Import `installation/lxr-ranch.sql` into your database
2. Add items from `installation/shared_items.lua` to your framework
3. Add jobs from `installation/shared_jobs.lua` to your framework
4. Place `lxr-ranch` folder in your `resources/` directory
5. Add `ensure lxr-ranch` to `server.cfg` (after framework + ox_lib)
6. Edit `config.lua` to customize settings
7. Restart server

**Full guide:** See `docs/INSTALL.md` in the resource folder.

**Support:** https://discord.gg/CrKcWdfd3A
